overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white Spider-Man suit exploring a rainy urban environment. The character walks from a gothic church plaza through city streets with moderate traffic, passing subway entrances, crosswalks, and bus stops with wet pavement reflections throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic church plaza with brick pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the church plaza toward the street, observing the gothic architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in purple shirt standing near the church entrance
man in gray jacket walking ahead toward the street

entered.detail: large stone church with arched doorway and gothic architectural details
red brick cobblestone ground covering the open plaza area
mature trees with green foliage lining the plaza edges
ornate black iron fence separating plaza from adjacent park area

segments.scene_description: The character stands before a grand gothic church facade on a wet brick plaza. Several pedestrians are scattered around the open space, some walking and others standing. The camera follows the character as they walk forward through the plaza, passing trees and benches, with the church architecture dominating the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with subway entrance and street traffic

events.description: exits the brick plaza onto concrete sidewalk next to a green subway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk passing the subway entrance and street lamps

notable_agents.action: man in tan coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: teal-colored metal railings and stairs leading down to subway station
large digital billboard with colorful advertisements across the street
green lamp post with posters and stickers attached

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the plaza onto a concrete city sidewalk. A green subway entrance with teal railings appears on the left, while modern glass buildings rise on the right. The character walks past street lamps and advertisements, with moderate pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles passing on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with crosswalks and intersection traffic

events.description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk while vehicles wait at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge and crossing at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the red traffic light

entered.detail: wet black asphalt street with white lane markings and puddle reflections
zebra crossing stripes painted on the road surface
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto the asphalt street, walking along the curb past parked cars. The scene features a busy intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks. At around 30 seconds, the character crosses the street at the crosswalk while a black sedan waits at the red light, surrounded by other pedestrians crossing in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: city avenue with bus stop and taxi stand

events.description: passing a bus stop zone with yellow taxis and people sitting on benches

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue past the bus stop and taxi stand

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a park bench near the bus stop

entered.detail: road section with yellow BUS STOP painted on asphalt surface
classic yellow taxi cab parked at the bus stop curb
wooden park bench with people sitting and waiting

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the city avenue, entering a bus stop zone marked with yellow paint on the road. Several yellow taxis are parked or moving along the right side, while people sit on benches on the left sidewalk. The wet pavement continues to reflect the overcast sky and street lights as the character walks past mailboxes and trash cans.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the quiet grandeur of a gothic church plaza into the bustling activity of a rainy city avenue. It begins with the character walking across a wet brick plaza dominated by the church's facade, passing scattered pedestrians and benches. As the character leaves the open square, the scene shifts to a concrete sidewalk flanked by a green subway entrance and towering glass buildings. The camera then follows the character as they move onto the asphalt street, navigating a busy intersection and crossing a rain-slicked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at a red light. Finally, the movement continues down the avenue into a bus stop zone, passing yellow taxis and street furniture as the wet pavement reflects the overcast sky.
